title_en: GAIA-2: A Controllable Multi-View Generative World Model for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: GAIA-2：面向自动驾驶的可控多视角生成式世界模型
abstract_en: GAIA-2 extends generative driving world models with stronger controllability, multi-view consistency, and richer scenario synthesis for autonomy evaluation.
abstract_zh: GAIA-2 强化了自动驾驶生成式世界模型的可控性、多视角一致性与复杂场景合成能力，用于自动驾驶评测与训练。
editorial_summary_zh: 把 GAIA-1 从概念验证推进到更可控、更接近生产级自动驾驶仿真平台。
editorial_summary_en: Moves GAIA from an early showcase to a more controllable driving-world-model stack.
why_it_matters: It shows how world models are becoming core infrastructure for generating, stress-testing, and evaluating edge-case driving scenarios at scale.
